assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the expected Role ('Rust backend service'), Serena Instance ('serena_backend'), and Path ('/home/user/trustify-backend') exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 show: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747 — all match the expected values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two clearly labeled sections: '## Preserved (unchanged)' (lines 7-22) listing the trustify-backend entry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence content; and '## Added (new)' (lines 24-30) listing the trustify-ui entry and serena_ui limitation. Each entry is explicitly categorized as preserved or added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-12 contain a table with: '| serena_backend | Already configured | ...' and '| serena_ui | Newly discovered | ...' — explicitly noting serena_backend as already configured and serena_ui as newly discovered.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-34 preserve: the naming convention 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`' (line 20), the serena_backend example with find_symbol call (lines 25-29), and the serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' (line 33). The only new content is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
